note: Copy this file to tm_{id}_state.json and fill in tm_id and subsystem_id before first use.

task_schema.note: Structure of active_task when a task is in progress
task_schema.subject: string
task_schema.status: received | in_progress | ready_for_review | rework | blocked | done
task_schema.cpk_message_id: string — CPK sent to SPM, or empty
task_schema.block_reason: string — reason if blocked, or empty
